svg.title: Subscription flow for an agent service (plain English)
svg.desc: Sequence diagram of how someone subscribes to an agent service and then uses it. Two phases. First, sign up: the user picks a plan, the system processes payment from the user's card or bank, and the subscription is confirmed. Second, use the service: the user requests the service, the service asks for proof of subscription, the user supplies the proof, the service checks the subscription record, and delivers the response.
